Topic: Regression metrics: MSE, MAE, R², adjusted R², RMSE, MAPE, Correlations (Pearson, Spearman, Kendall), AIC, BIC, residual diagnostics (heteroscedasticity, non-normality, outliers), QQ plots, leverage + influence (Cook's distance).
Classification metrics: Accuracy, confusion matrix, precision, recall, F1, ROC AUC, PR AUC
Clustering metrics: Silhouette score, Davies-Bouldin index, Calinski-Harabasz index, elbow method (inertia)
Model interpretability (feature importance, partial dependence plots, SHAP values)
